Brittany uses 1/4 ounce of shampoo every other day, which means she consumes 0.125 ounces on average per day over the course of a leap year that has 366 days, resulting in a total usage of 45.75 ounces for the year. Since she buys 14-ounce bottles, she will need to purchase four bottles to cover her [annual] supply, as three bottles would only provide 42 ounces and leave her short by 3.75 ounces.

To ensure she does not run out before the year ends, she must plan for the extra volume required during the [leap year] period, confirming that four bottles are the minimum necessary to complete the full 366-day cycle. This calculation assumes consistent usage patterns without any variation in the amount applied per wash, and it accounts for the specific frequency of every other day throughout the entire year.
